sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ الْكُتَّابُ الْعَرَبُ صُوَرًا جَمِيلَةً فِي كِتَابَاتِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Arapski pisci koriste lijepe slike u svojim spisima.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic writers use beautiful imagery in their writings.

sentences.translation: Oni porede velikodušnost sa prostranim morem.
sentences.translationEn: They compare generosity to the vast sea.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا يَصِفُونَ الْوَجْهَ الْجَمِيلَ بِالْقَمَرِ الْمُنِيرِ فِي اللَّيْلِ.
sentences.translation: Također opisuju lijepo lice kao svijetleći mjesec u noći.
sentences.translationEn: They also describe a beautiful face as the shining moon at night.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الِاسْتِعَارَاتُ تَجْعَلُ النَّصَّ أَكْثَرَ رَوْعَةً.
sentences.translationEn: These metaphors make the text more magnificent.

sentences.arabic: يَفْهَمُ الْقَارِئُ الْمَشَاعِرَ مِنْ خِلَالِ هَذِهِ الصُّوَرِ الْبَلَاغِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Čitalac razumije osjećaje kroz ove retoričke slike.
sentences.translationEn: The reader understands emotions through these rhetorical images.
